title: Materialized coherent snapshots for dimensional actuals
description: Guarantee stable cross-process pagination and exact totals over mutable ledger projections.
decision: Materialize the first page and full-set totals under one immediate transaction from facts, relationships, evidence, reconciliation, category, pool, instrument, and cardholder state. Order by Effective Date then transaction ULID. Later pages read only the opaque snapshot cursor. Exclude snapshots from Durable Ledger State and backups.
rationale: Process invocations cannot hold database read transactions across pages. A committed ephemeral snapshot preserves one coherent result and exact pool/category totals.
alternatives: Rejected offset pagination over live rows, long-lived cross-process transactions, caller-maintained cursors, and pre-aggregated budget-owned totals.
consequences: First-page queries briefly use the single writer and may return busy. Reconciliation alone cannot change monetary totals, while dimension corrections change groups but not the all-up exact total.
status_notes: Expanded snapshot projection to reconciliation and independent financial dimensions.
